motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def reachNumber(self, target: int) -> int:
        target = abs(target)
        moves = 0
        step = 1
        while moves < target:
            moves += step
            step += 1
        while (moves - target) % 2 != 0:
            moves += step
            step += 1
        return moves
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(sqrt(target))
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
